title: CIS 本质 / What is a CIS
point: 汇集众多投资者资金,由管理人按目标统一投资。 / Pools investors’ money managed collectively toward an objective.
keyfacts: 如单位信托/基金 / e.g. unit trusts/funds
sourceRef: SFA CIS offer regime + MAS Code on Collective Investment Schemes / OPERA prospectus registration

title: CIS 授权 / CIS authorisation
point: 零售须授权 + 招股书;但 MAS 授权≠回报保证。 / Retail needs authorisation + prospectus; MAS authorisation ≠ guaranteed returns.
sourceRef: SFA CIS offer regime + MAS Code on Collective Investment Schemes / OPERA prospectus registration
